## Change

Describe the user need, affected task and supported game/UI versions.

## Source and license

- [ ] Code is original or every copied/adapted source is documented.
- [ ] No unlicensed repository content is included.
- [ ] No official game assets are distributed without permission.
- [ ] Dependencies and model files are listed in THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md.

## Red lines

- [ ] No memory read/write.
- [ ] No injection, Hook or driver.
- [ ] No anti-cheat bypass, evasion or detection avoidance.
- [ ] No private protocol or unpublished API.
- [ ] No account credentials.
- [ ] No payment or premium-currency spending.
- [ ] No multi-account cloud control.
- [ ] No arbitrary script/plugin execution.

## Automation safety

- [ ] State is verified before and after actions.
- [ ] Unknown states stop safely.
- [ ] Retry and runtime limits exist.
- [ ] Emergency stop remains effective.
- [ ] User input pauses automation.
- [ ] Sensitive pages are blocked.
- [ ] Tests include failure and misrecognition cases.

## Privacy

- [ ] Screenshots/logs stay local by default.
- [ ] Personal data is minimized and export is previewable.
